name: /standards-audit: --include-archived also surfaces sources that were removed via /standards-remove (their files moved to _archived/) so operator can review
command:
mkdir -p tree/google/_archived && printf "source:
  id: removed-source
  authoritative_publisher: R
  authoritative_url: https://r.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
" > tree/google/_archived/removed.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --tree "$PWD/tree" --emit "$PWD/audit.md" --include-archived && grep "removed-source" audit.md 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
